title: triteleia ixioides subsp. scabra
intro: Triteleia ixioides subsp. scabra, also known as the rough or scabrous Idaho fawn lily, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Triteleia ixioides subsp. scabra include its potential to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it is essential to consult with a medical professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
